company_description: Trellix is a cybersecurity company delivering an AI-powered, open security platform spanning endpoint, email, network, data, and cloud security with integrated threat detection and response capabilities.

products.name: Trellix Security Platform
products.description: An AI-powered, open security platform that integrates endpoint, email, network, data, and cloud security with centralized orchestration and LEARN AI capabilities via Trellix Wise.

products.name: Trellix Endpoint Security
products.description: A single-agent endpoint security solution providing attack surface reduction, protection, detection, forensics, and remediation across hybrid environments.

products.name: Trellix EDR with Forensics
products.description: Endpoint detection and response solution with integrated forensics capabilities for investigating and responding to advanced threats.

products.name: Trellix Endpoint Forensics
products.description: Dedicated endpoint forensics tool for deep investigation of security incidents and threat artifacts on endpoints.

products.name: Trellix Application and Change Control
products.description: Application whitelisting and change control solution that prevents unauthorized applications and system changes on endpoints.

products.name: Trellix Mobile Security
products.description: Mobile threat defense solution protecting iOS and Android devices from malware, network attacks, and application vulnerabilities.

products.name: Trellix ePolicy Orchestrator (ePO)
products.description: Centralized security management platform for policy enforcement, compliance reporting, and orchestration of Trellix endpoint and security products.

products.name: Trellix Data Loss Prevention
products.description: Data loss prevention solution that monitors, detects, and blocks unauthorized transfer or exfiltration of sensitive data across endpoints, networks, and cloud.

products.name: Trellix Data Encryption
products.description: Enterprise encryption solution protecting data at rest on endpoints, removable media, and file shares to prevent unauthorized access.

products.name: Trellix Database Security
products.description: Database activity monitoring and protection solution that detects and prevents unauthorized access, SQL injection, and data exfiltration from databases.

products.name: Trellix Network Security
products.description: Network detection and response platform that identifies and blocks advanced threats traversing the network using behavioral analysis and threat intelligence.

products.name: Trellix Network Forensics
products.description: Full-packet capture and network forensics solution enabling retrospective investigation of network traffic for threat hunting and incident response.

products.name: Trellix Intrusion Prevention System
products.description: Network-based intrusion prevention system that detects and blocks exploit attempts, malware communications, and policy violations in real time.

products.name: Trellix Insights
products.description: Threat intelligence platform providing contextual insights on the evolving threat landscape to prioritize and guide security operations. LEARN AI.

products.name: Trellix SecondSight
products.description: Security posture and risk visibility platform that aggregates telemetry across the Trellix ecosystem to surface gaps and prioritize remediation.

products.name: Trellix Threat Intelligence Exchange
products.description: Real-time threat intelligence sharing fabric that enables security products to exchange file reputation and threat data across the enterprise.

products.name: Trellix Advanced Threat Landscape Analysis System (ATLAS)
products.description: Global threat landscape analysis system aggregating telemetry from millions of sensors to identify emerging attack campaigns and threat actors.

products.name: Trellix Global Threat Intelligence
products.description: Cloud-based threat intelligence feed providing real-time reputation data on files, IPs, URLs, and domains to enhance detection across Trellix products.

products.name: Trellix Private Global Threat Intelligence
products.description: On-premises deployment of Trellix's global threat intelligence service for air-gapped or high-security environments requiring local intelligence processing.

products.name: Trellix Intelligence as a Service
products.description: Subscription-based threat intelligence service delivering curated, actionable intelligence feeds and reports to security teams.

products.name: Trellix Email Security
products.description: Advanced email security solution protecting against phishing, business email compromise, malware, and targeted email attacks.

products.name: Trellix Collaboration Security
products.description: Security solution protecting collaboration platforms such as Microsoft Teams and SharePoint from malware and data leakage.

products.name: Trellix Wise
products.description: Purpose-built generative and predictive AI engine embedded in the Trellix Security Platform powering detections, guided investigations, summarization, and threat contextualization. CREATE AI / LEARN AI.

products.name: Trellix XDR
products.description: Extended detection and response platform correlating telemetry across endpoint, network, email, and cloud to accelerate threat detection and response. LEARN AI.

products.name: Trellix SIEM
products.description: Security information and event management solution collecting, correlating, and analyzing security events across the enterprise for threat detection and compliance.

products.name: Trellix SOAR
products.description: Security orchestration, automation, and response platform enabling playbook-driven incident response and workflow automation across security tools.

products.name: Trellix Helix
products.description: Cloud-native security operations platform integrating SIEM, SOAR, and threat intelligence for unified SecOps workflows and incident management.

products.name: Trellix Cloud Security
products.description: Cloud workload and infrastructure security solution protecting multi-cloud environments including AWS, Azure, and GCP from misconfigurations and threats.

products.name: Trellix Malware Analysis
products.description: Dynamic malware analysis sandbox that detonates suspicious files and URLs in an isolated environment to identify malicious behavior and generate threat intelligence.

products.name: Trellix Detection on Demand
products.description: API-accessible malware detection service enabling developers and security teams to submit files for real-time analysis and verdict.

products.name: Trellix Managed Detection and Response (MDR)
products.description: Managed detection and response service providing 24/7 threat monitoring, investigation, and response by Trellix security experts.

products.name: Trellix Active Response
products.description: Endpoint investigation and response tool enabling security teams to collect forensic data, hunt for threats, and take containment actions across endpoints.

products.name: Trellix Vulnerability Management
products.description: Vulnerability assessment and prioritization solution that identifies security weaknesses across endpoints and infrastructure to guide remediation.

products.name: Trellix OT Security
products.description: Operational technology security solution protecting industrial control systems and critical infrastructure from cyber threats.

products.name: Trellix Education Services
products.description: Trellix's official training program offering instructor-led, eLearning, and hands-on lab courses for configuring and managing Trellix security products.

competitive_products.competitive_context: CrowdStrike Falcon competes directly with Trellix Endpoint Security and EDR as a leading cloud-native endpoint protection and XDR platform.
Cortex XDR competes with Trellix XDR and endpoint security across detection, investigation, and response workflows.
Microsoft Defender for Endpoint competes with Trellix Endpoint Security across enterprise endpoint protection and EDR.
Splunk Enterprise Security competes with Trellix SIEM and Helix for security event management and analytics.
Proofpoint Email Protection competes with Trellix Email Security for enterprise email threat defense.
Symantec Endpoint Security competes with Trellix Endpoint Security across enterprise endpoint protection markets.
SentinelOne Singularity competes with Trellix EDR and XDR with autonomous AI-driven endpoint detection and response.
Forcepoint DLP competes with Trellix Data Loss Prevention for enterprise data protection and insider threat prevention.
Cisco Secure Network Analytics competes with Trellix Network Security and NDR for network threat detection.
IBM QRadar competes with Trellix SIEM and Helix for enterprise security information and event management.

partnership_signals.ilt_vilt: Instructor-led and eLearning product training offered via Trellix Education Services

page_contents.atp_page: Education Services | Trellix Take a Product Tour Request a Demo Cybersecurity Assessment Contact Us Education Services A broad training portfolio maximizes the benefit and ROI from your solutions. Product Training To gain maximum value from your solutions, you need expertly trained staff to configure and manage your solutions more efficiently, and optimally safeguard your critical data. You also need your staff on-site, doing their job. Now you can have both. We offer a wide range of hands-on product training courses to help you design, set up, configure, and manage your solutions. Our courses help you make the most of your product investment. Browse our public instructor-led courses for scheduled offerings. Browse our selection of eLearning courses, available online at any time. To schedule a private course for your organization or to inquire about a custom course, please contact us . Explore and Register for Training Security Training Get comprehensive and focused in-person classroom training. Held in private classes at your location, our fully immersive training is led by our experienced security instructors and gives you the opportunity to build best practices for implementing a cybersecurity strategy. Gain the skills you need to proactively defend against the latest security threats. Our comprehensive security training from top industry experts helps your IT professionals gain proficiency in best practices to implement your security strategy and better respond to incidents. Our security courses provide training to help security professionals build secure software and applications, assess vulnerabilities to defend against hacker attacks, and gain critical computer forensics skills to better respond to incidents. Taught by network security experts, our security training features interactive demonstrations and hands-on lab exercises. These instructor-led courses are offered in private classrooms only. To schedule please contact us . Courses IT Risk Strategy - Measure and Treat IT Risk Across Your Enterprise. Application Security Training - Courses include: Attacking Web Applications, Attacking Android and iOS, Building Secure Software, Writing Secure Code: Java. Infrastructure Security Training - Courses include: Beginning Assessment & Penetration Testing, Advanced Assessment and Penetration Testing, Attacking Wireless Technologies, Attacking Firmware, Industrial Control Security, Attacking ICS and IoT. Forensics and Incident Response - Courses include:

Partners | Trellix Take a Product Tour Request a Demo Cybersecurity Assessment Contact Us Trellix Partners Explore our NEW Xtend Global Partner Program Become a Partner Trellix Partner Portal Xtend Partner Program Our partnership advances your security business with a new approach to security that is fast enough to keep up with dynamic threats and intelligent enough to learn from them. Partnering with Trellix extends your customer relationships by developing trust, applying security expertise, and customizing your security offerings to defend against the biggest cyber threats. Trellix Partner Portal Login OEM & Embedded Alliance Build security directly into your products Deliver robust protection, by embedding into Trellix solutions, to serve customers with the unique advantage of purpose-built security directly into your products. Learn More Partner Delivered Services Best-in-class security services Get the help you need whether it is deploying solutions, hardening your defenses, managing your environment, or transforming your business. Learn More Become a Partner Partner with Trellix to deliver best-in-class, optimized security solutions to your customers. Trellix partners have the inside track on trending security issues, technologies, and products. Become a Partner Security Advisors Provide security expertise delivered through a sophisticated range of efficient cybersecurity services to ensure customers can rise to any security challenge and become cyber-resilient while mitigating risk. Marketplace Partners Deliver emerging, digitally scalable buying motions based on simplicity, flexibility, and minimum time to value. Technology Alliance Program The Technology Alliance Program (TAP) brings together innovative technology partners to deliver scalable, seamless integrations with the Trellix AI-powered security platform. Guided by a customer-first approach, we focus on extending protection, simplifying complex environments, and driving measurable impact where it matters most. Ready to build with Trellix?
